titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Provost's Office, Yale University, Records Concerning the 1974 Summer Strike
Provost's Office, Yale University, Records Concerning the 1974 Summer Strike
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 17, 2019 at 07:04
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Provost's Office, Yale University, records concerning the 1974 summer strike
did.abstract: The records consist of memoranda, briefs, reports, and background files documenting the 1974 summer strike at Yale.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 3-A (YRG 3-A), Records of the Yale provost's office.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See inventory for details.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Provost's Office, Yale University, Records Concerning the 1974 Summer Strike (RU 790). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of memoranda, briefs, reports, and background files documenting the 1974 summer strike at Yale.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by type of material.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost
